meta.name: description
meta.content: Bitcoin is money — sound, trustless, censorship-resistant. Botanix builds the rails for a global economy where Bitcoin powers every transaction.

div.data-framer-name: Bitcoin is the world’s soundest money. Botanix Labs builds the censorship-resistant rails for a global financial system where Bitcoin powers every transaction.

h5.strong: Bitcoin is the best money — sound, trustless, censorship-resistant.

div.h5: Botanix builds the rails for a global economy where Bitcoin powers every transaction.

div.data-framer-name: Bitcoin is the world’s soundest money. Botanix Labs builds the censorship-resistant rails for a global financial system where Bitcoin powers every transaction.
div.p: Bitcoin is money — sound, trustless, censorship-resistant. Botanix builds the rails for a global economy where Bitcoin powers every transaction.

div.h6: Create an account and hold your assets
Acquire Bitcoin to get started with Botanix
Stake Bitcoin and accrue real Bitcoin yield

div.data-framer-name: Bitcoin is the world’s soundest money. Botanix Labs builds the censorship-resistant rails for a global financial system where Bitcoin powers every transaction.
div.h4: Bitcoin was created to be a global currency—open to anyone, anywhere—empowering individuals in emerging markets to use BTC as a hedge against inflation as well as enabling permissionless financial markets in industrialized countries. Botanix makes this accessible by bringing Bitcoin on-chain in a secure, simple way for everyone to join a fair, transparent, and unstoppable financial system.

div.data-framer-name: Bitcoin is the world’s soundest money. Botanix Labs builds the censorship-resistant rails for a global financial system where Bitcoin powers every transaction.
div.h4: Bitcoin was created to be a global currency—open to anyone, anywhere—empowering individuals in emerging markets to use BTC as a hedge against inflation as well as enabling permissionless financial markets in industrialized countries. Botanix makes this accessible by bringing Bitcoin on-chain in a secure, simple way for everyone to join a fair, transparent, and unstoppable financial system.

div.h1:
Bitcoin is meant
to be used

div.data-framer-name: Bitcoin is the world’s soundest money. Botanix Labs builds the censorship-resistant rails for a global financial system where Bitcoin powers every transaction.
div.h4: Bitcoin was originally designed as peer-to-peer electronic cash, not just as a store of value. Botanix brings this vision to life by letting you transact and save securely in bitcoin without ever selling.

div.h1:
Bitcoin is meant
to be used

div.data-framer-name: Bitcoin is the world’s soundest money. Botanix Labs builds the censorship-resistant rails for a global financial system where Bitcoin powers every transaction.
div.h4: Bitcoin was originally designed as peer-to-peer electronic cash, not just as a store of value. Botanix brings this vision to life by letting you transact and save securely in bitcoin without ever selling.

div.h1:
Bitcoin is meant
to be used

div.data-framer-name: Bitcoin is the world’s soundest money. Botanix Labs builds the censorship-resistant rails for a global financial system where Bitcoin powers every transaction.
div.h4: Bitcoin was originally designed as peer-to-peer electronic cash, not just as a store of value. Botanix brings this vision to life by letting you transact and save securely in bitcoin without ever selling.

div.data-framer-name: Bitcoin is the world’s soundest money. Botanix Labs builds the censorship-resistant rails for a global financial system where Bitcoin powers every transaction.
div.h4: Bitcoin’s decentralization is its strength, and Botanix ensures it stays that way with the Spiderchain - a decentralized network of independent operators, so your funds remain safe from centralized control.

div.data-framer-name: Bitcoin is the world’s soundest money. Botanix Labs builds the censorship-resistant rails for a global financial system where Bitcoin powers every transaction.
div.h4: Bitcoin’s decentralization is its strength, and Botanix ensures it stays that way with the Spiderchain - a decentralized network of independent operators, so your funds remain safe from centralized control.

div.data-framer-name: Bitcoin is the world’s soundest money. Botanix Labs builds the censorship-resistant rails for a global financial system where Bitcoin powers every transaction.
div.h4: Bitcoin’s decentralization is its strength, and Botanix ensures it stays that way with the Spiderchain - a decentralized network of independent operators, so your funds remain safe from centralized control.

div.data-framer-name: Bitcoin is the world’s soundest money. Botanix Labs builds the censorship-resistant rails for a global financial system where Bitcoin powers every transaction.
div.h4: Botanix is the Bitcoin-based blockchain for applications building the financialization of Bitcoin.
